mapper.delete: delete from role_user where id in (select t.id from (select id from role_user where userid not in (select id from user) or roleid not in (select id from role)) t)
mapper.select:
select u.id,u.loginname,u.name,u.tel,o.name orgname from role_user ru left join user u on ru.userid = u.id left join organization o on u.orgid = o.id where u.id is not null and ru.roleid=#{roleid}
and u.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
and u.loginname like concat('%',#{loginname},'%')
and u.tel like concat('%',#{tel},'%')

select distinct r.id,r.name,r.code,r.description from role_user ru left join role r on ru.roleid = r.id where r.id is not null and ru.userid=#{userid}
and r.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
and r.code like concat('%',#{code},'%')
and r.description like concat('%',#{description},'%')
